title.zh: (400–500 GSM) / (14oz - 17.5oz) Heavyweight Hoodies for U.S. Streetwear Brands
title.en: (400–500 GSM) / (14oz - 17.5oz) Heavyweight Hoodies for U.S. Streetwear Brands

description.zh: Built for premium streetwear brands, our heavyweight hoodies are available in 500GSM, 580GSM, and 640GSM cotton fleece. Each hoodie is engineered with a structured oversized fit, double-layer hood, reinforced shoulder seams, and ribbing designed to retain elasticity after 50+ wash cycles. With fabric shrinkage controlled below 3% and colorfastness rated at Grade 4 or above, these hoodies deliver the weight, durability, and premium hand feel demanded by today's American and global streetwear markets.
description.en: Built for premium streetwear brands, our heavyweight hoodies are available in 500GSM, 580GSM, and 640GSM cotton fleece. Each hoodie is engineered with a structured oversized fit, double-layer hood, reinforced shoulder seams, and ribbing designed to retain elasticity after 50+ wash cycles. With fabric shrinkage controlled below 3% and colorfastness rated at Grade 4 or above, these hoodies deliver the weight, durability, and premium hand feel demanded by today's American and global streetwear markets.

description.zh: Our oversized T-shirts are crafted from 280GSM to 320GSM 100% combed cotton, offering a substantial hand feel and exceptional drape. Designed with dropped shoulders, a relaxed boxy silhouette, and high-density rib collars, they maintain their shape even after repeated wear and washing. Ideal for screen printing, puff printing, DTG, and embroidery, these tees provide the perfect blank canvas for modern streetwear collections.
description.en: Our oversized T-shirts are crafted from 280GSM to 320GSM 100% combed cotton, offering a substantial hand feel and exceptional drape. Designed with dropped shoulders, a relaxed boxy silhouette, and high-density rib collars, they maintain their shape even after repeated wear and washing. Ideal for screen printing, puff printing, DTG, and embroidery, these tees provide the perfect blank canvas for modern streetwear collections.

description.zh: Designed for both comfort and street-ready aesthetics, our sweatpants and joggers are produced using heavyweight fleece ranging from 380GSM to 520GSM. Features include reinforced crotch construction, durable drawcord systems, elastic waistbands, and ribbed ankle cuffs engineered for long-term wear. Each pair undergoes rigorous quality testing to ensure minimal shrinkage, consistent sizing, and excellent recovery after extensive use.
description.en: Designed for both comfort and street-ready aesthetics, our sweatpants and joggers are produced using heavyweight fleece ranging from 380GSM to 520GSM. Features include reinforced crotch construction, durable drawcord systems, elastic waistbands, and ribbed ankle cuffs engineered for long-term wear. Each pair undergoes rigorous quality testing to ensure minimal shrinkage, consistent sizing, and excellent recovery after extensive use.

description.zh: Our blank streetwear collection provides brands with premium-quality essentials ready for customization. From hoodies and T-shirts to sweatpants and shorts, every garment is manufactured using high-grade cotton fabrics, precision-cut patterns, and strict quality standards. With low MOQs starting at 100 pieces, flexible private label services, and multiple finishing options, Kellogg Fashion helps brands develop scalable, high-margin streetwear collections with confidence.

title.zh: High-Quality Craftsmanship for Wholesale Streetwear Manufacturing in USA Market
title.en: High-Quality Craftsmanship for Wholesale Streetwear Manufacturing in USA Market

description.zh: At Kellogg, we specialize in crafting heavyweight hoodies and sweatshirts with 350–450 GSM (12.3oz-15.8oz) combed cotton and cotton blends, ensuring a durable, warm, and soft touch. Our fabrics are carefully pre-shrunk and undergo high-density knitting, offering superior resilience and maintaining shape even after repeated washes. This results in products that meet the expectations of US streetwear retailers for long-lasting, high-quality apparel.
description.en: At Kellogg, we specialize in crafting heavyweight hoodies and sweatshirts with 350–450 GSM (12.3oz-15.8oz) combed cotton and cotton blends, ensuring a durable, warm, and soft touch. Our fabrics are carefully pre-shrunk and undergo high-density knitting, offering superior resilience and maintaining shape even after repeated washes. This results in products that meet the expectations of US streetwear retailers for long-lasting, high-quality apparel.

description.zh: Our garments are produced using advanced industrial sewing machines and strict multi-step quality control. Key stress points such as shoulders, sleeves, and pockets are reinforced with double or triple stitching, minimizing the risk of seam failure. This level of craftsmanship guarantees that bulk orders for US retailers can withstand rigorous daily wear and extended shelf life.
description.en: Our garments are produced using advanced industrial sewing machines and strict multi-step quality control. Key stress points such as shoulders, sleeves, and pockets are reinforced with double or triple stitching, minimizing the risk of seam failure. This level of craftsmanship guarantees that bulk orders for US retailers can withstand rigorous daily wear and extended shelf life.

description.zh: We excel in customizable design features, including embroidered logos, printed graphics, ribbed cuffs, and drawstring variations. Our team can handle orders with specific color codes, Pantone matching, and US sizing standards (S–3XL), making it easy for American brands to maintain brand consistency. These capabilities allow for versatile, trend-driven collections tailored to the US streetwear market.
description.en: We excel in customizable design features, including embroidered logos, printed graphics, ribbed cuffs, and drawstring variations. Our team can handle orders with specific color codes, Pantone matching, and US sizing standards (S–3XL), making it easy for American brands to maintain brand consistency. These capabilities allow for versatile, trend-driven collections tailored to the US streetwear market.

description.zh: All our fabrics are dyed with low-impact, AZO-free dyes that comply with US textile safety regulations (OEKO-TEX certified). Our finishing processes minimize chemical residues and reduce environmental impact while ensuring vibrant, long-lasting colors. This commitment positions Kellogg as a responsible supplier for environmentally-conscious US buyers.
description.en: All our fabrics are dyed with low-impact, AZO-free dyes that comply with US textile safety regulations (OEKO-TEX certified). Our finishing processes minimize chemical residues and reduce environmental impact while ensuring vibrant, long-lasting colors. This commitment positions Kellogg as a responsible supplier for environmentally-conscious US buyers.

subtitle.zh: At Kellogg Fashion, we specialize in wholesale heavyweight hoodies, sweatshirts, joggers, and streetwear apparel manufacturing for US brands and retailers. Our production system is designed to meet the demands of the American fashion market, combining durability, consistency, and scalable bulk production for seasonal collections.
subtitle.en: At Kellogg Fashion, we specialize in wholesale heavyweight hoodies, sweatshirts, joggers, and streetwear apparel manufacturing for US brands and retailers. Our production system is designed to meet the demands of the American fashion market, combining durability, consistency, and scalable bulk production for seasonal collections.

title.zh: Why American Brands Choose Kellogg Fashion?
title.en: Why American Brands Choose Kellogg Fashion?

description.zh: American streetwear culture places a premium on the "hand-feel" and structural integrity of a garment. Kellogg Fashion specializes in high-GSM (Grams per Square Meter) fabrics, often ranging from 400 GSM to over 500 GSM. Unlike standard suppliers, Kellogg’s textiles are engineered to be "stiff" and "dense" rather than just thick, providing the rugged, high-end aesthetic that US consumers associate with luxury streetwear brands.
description.en: American streetwear culture places a premium on the "hand-feel" and structural integrity of a garment. Kellogg Fashion specializes in high-GSM (Grams per Square Meter) fabrics, often ranging from 400 GSM to over 500 GSM. Unlike standard suppliers, Kellogg’s textiles are engineered to be "stiff" and "dense" rather than just thick, providing the rugged, high-end aesthetic that US consumers associate with luxury streetwear brands.

description.zh: The US market has moved away from slim or standard European cuts toward a very specific "Boxy Fit." This includes dropped shoulders, cropped body lengths, and wide sleeves. Kellogg Fashion has developed a deep library of pre-vetted patterns that specifically cater to this aesthetic. By providing "brand-ready" silhouettes, they allow American labels to skip the long, expensive process of multiple sampling rounds to get the fit right.
description.en: The US market has moved away from slim or standard European cuts toward a very specific "Boxy Fit." This includes dropped shoulders, cropped body lengths, and wide sleeves. Kellogg Fashion has developed a deep library of pre-vetted patterns that specifically cater to this aesthetic. By providing "brand-ready" silhouettes, they allow American labels to skip the long, expensive process of multiple sampling rounds to get the fit right.

description.zh: The modern American fashion business model relies heavily on the "Drop" system—releasing limited quantities frequently to maintain hype. Kellogg Fashion offers a flexible, low-MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) framework that is highly attractive to both boutique labels and scaling brands. This agility allows American companies to test new colors and designs with minimal inventory risk, moving from a creative concept to a physical sample in as little as 7 to 10 days.
description.en: The modern American fashion business model relies heavily on the "Drop" system—releasing limited quantities frequently to maintain hype. Kellogg Fashion offers a flexible, low-MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) framework that is highly attractive to both boutique labels and scaling brands. This agility allows American companies to test new colors and designs with minimal inventory risk, moving from a creative concept to a physical sample in as little as 7 to 10 days.

description.zh: International sourcing can be a logistical nightmare regarding customs, duties, and shipping times. Kellogg Fashion has established a robust export infrastructure specifically for the North American market. By offering transparent communication and professional logistics solutions—such as DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping—they function as a "plug-and-play" backend for US brands, allowing founders to focus on marketing and community building while the production is handled with professional reliability.
description.en: International sourcing can be a logistical nightmare regarding customs, duties, and shipping times. Kellogg Fashion has established a robust export infrastructure specifically for the North American market. By offering transparent communication and professional logistics solutions—such as DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping—they function as a "plug-and-play" backend for US brands, allowing founders to focus on marketing and community building while the production is handled with professional reliability.

content.zh:
Background: A startup brand based in Los Angeles focusing on oversized streetwear. The client needed a reliable manufacturer for their first hoodie drop but faced issues with high local production costs and unstable quality.//

Order Details: Product: 450 GSM Heavyweight Hoodies. Quantity: 300 pcs. Customization: Screen printing + woven labels. MOQ: 100 pcs per color. Production Time: 18 days//

Results:First drop sold out in 21 days. Achieved 62% gross profit margin. Reordered 500 pcs within 30 days. Customer return rate: 28% repeat buyers. //

Key Improvements We Delivered:Reduced production cost by 35% vs US local suppliers. Stabilized sizing consistency (shrinkage controlled under 3%). Delivered bulk order within promised timeline
content.en:
Background: A startup brand based in Los Angeles focusing on oversized streetwear. The client needed a reliable manufacturer for their first hoodie drop but faced issues with high local production costs and unstable quality.//

Order Details: Product: 450 GSM Heavyweight Hoodies. Quantity: 300 pcs. Customization: Screen printing + woven labels. MOQ: 100 pcs per color. Production Time: 18 days//

Results:First drop sold out in 21 days. Achieved 62% gross profit margin. Reordered 500 pcs within 30 days. Customer return rate: 28% repeat buyers. //

Key Improvements We Delivered:Reduced production cost by 35% vs US local suppliers. Stabilized sizing consistency (shrinkage controlled under 3%). Delivered bulk order within promised timeline

content.zh:
Background:An established streetwear brand in New York previously working with multiple suppliers in Asia but struggled with inconsistent fabric quality and delayed deliveries.//

Order Details:Product: 420 GSM French Terry Hoodies. Quantity: 800 pcs. Customization: Embroidery logo + custom dye. Production Time: 20 days//

Results: Reduced defect rate from 12% → 3.5%. Improved on-time delivery rate to 95%. Increased repeat order frequency from every 3 months → monthly. Annual order volume increased by 2.3x. //

Key Improvements We Delivered: Standardized fabric sourcing (same GSM & dye lot control). Established stable production timeline. Improved stitching durability (double-needle reinforcement)
content.en:

Results: Reduced defect rate from 12% → 3.5%. Improved on-time delivery rate to 95%. Increased repeat order frequency from every 3 months → monthly. Annual order volume increased by 2.3x. //

Key Improvements We Delivered: Standardized fabric sourcing (same GSM & dye lot control). Established stable production timeline. Improved stitching durability (double-needle reinforcement)

content.zh:
Background:A fast-growing Shopify brand focused on casual streetwear. The client wanted to test new hoodie designs with low risk before scaling.//

Order Details:Product: 400 GSM Oversized Hoodies. Initial Order: 150 pcs. Customization: Puff print logo + private label. Sampling Time: 7 days. Bulk Production: 15 days. //

Results: Test batch sold out in 14 days. Scaled to 1,200 pcs within 2 months. Achieved 4.8/5 customer rating. Reduced inventory risk by 40% through small-batch testing. //

Key Improvements We Delivered: Supported low MOQ for product validation. Fast sampling turnaround (7 days). Flexible scaling for bulk production

FAQ - Find answers to common questions here

question.zh: What Is Your Minimum Order Quantity For USA Orders?
question.en: Q: What Is Your Minimum Order Quantity For USA Orders?

answer.zh: Our standard MOQ starts at 100 pieces per color per style. This low minimum allows emerging American streetwear brands to test new collections without carrying excessive inventory. For mixed-size runs, we offer flexible size breakdowns based on your sales needs.
answer.en: A: Our standard MOQ starts at 100 pieces per color per style. This low minimum allows emerging American streetwear brands to test new collections without carrying excessive inventory. For mixed-size runs, we offer flexible size breakdowns based on your sales needs.

question.zh: How Long Does Shipping To Los Angeles Take?
question.en: Q: How Long Does Shipping To Los Angeles Take?

answer.zh: For air freight, delivery to Los Angeles typically takes 7–12 business days after production is completed. Sea freight usually requires 18–28 business days, depending on port schedules and customs clearance. We also offer express courier services for urgent sample shipments.
answer.en: A: For air freight, delivery to Los Angeles typically takes 7–12 business days after production is completed. Sea freight usually requires 18–28 business days, depending on port schedules and customs clearance. We also offer express courier services for urgent sample shipments.

question.zh: Can You Ship DDP To Amazon FBA?
question.en: Q: Can You Ship DDP To Amazon FBA?

answer.zh: Yes, we provide full DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping services to Amazon FBA warehouses, third-party logistics centers, and private warehouses throughout the United States. Our team handles customs clearance, import duties, and final delivery, allowing you to focus entirely on sales and inventory management.
answer.en: A: Yes, we provide full DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping services to Amazon FBA warehouses, third-party logistics centers, and private warehouses throughout the United States. Our team handles customs clearance, import duties, and final delivery, allowing you to focus entirely on sales and inventory management.

question.zh: Do You Offer Oversized American Fit?
question.en: Q: Do You Offer Oversized American Fit?

answer.zh: Absolutely. Our patterns are specifically developed for the American streetwear market, including oversized silhouettes, drop shoulders, boxy cuts, and extended sleeve lengths. We can also replicate your existing fit samples or develop custom measurements based on your brand specifications.
answer.en: A: Absolutely. Our patterns are specifically developed for the American streetwear market, including oversized silhouettes, drop shoulders, boxy cuts, and extended sleeve lengths. We can also replicate your existing fit samples or develop custom measurements based on your brand specifications.

question.zh: Can I Order A Sample Before Bulk Production?
question.en: Q: Can I Order A Sample Before Bulk Production?

answer.zh: Yes, sample orders are highly recommended before mass production. Standard sample lead time is 7–10 business days. This allows you to review fabric weight, fit, stitching, printing, and embroidery quality before approving full production.
answer.en: A: Yes, sample orders are highly recommended before mass production. Standard sample lead time is 7–10 business days. This allows you to review fabric weight, fit, stitching, printing, and embroidery quality before approving full production.

question.zh: What Fabric Weights Do You Offer For Heavyweight Hoodies?
question.en: Q: What Fabric Weights Do You Offer For Heavyweight Hoodies?

answer.zh: We specialize in heavyweight fleece fabrics ranging from 380GSM to 640GSM. Our most popular options for American brands are 420GSM, 450GSM, and 500GSM, which deliver the premium structure and durability expected in the U.S. streetwear market.
answer.en: A: We specialize in heavyweight fleece fabrics ranging from 380GSM to 640GSM. Our most popular options for American brands are 420GSM, 450GSM, and 500GSM, which deliver the premium structure and durability expected in the U.S. streetwear market.

question.zh: What Is Your Typical Production Lead Time?
question.en: Q: What Is Your Typical Production Lead Time?

answer.zh: Bulk production usually takes 20–30 days after sample approval and deposit confirmation. Larger orders or highly customized projects may require slightly longer lead times. We always provide a detailed production schedule before order confirmation.
answer.en: A: Bulk production usually takes 20–30 days after sample approval and deposit confirmation. Larger orders or highly customized projects may require slightly longer lead times. We always provide a detailed production schedule before order confirmation.

question.en: Q: Can You Match Pantone Colors?

answer.zh: Yes, we can match your specified Pantone colors for both fabric dyeing and printing. Lab dips are provided for approval before bulk production to ensure color consistency across your entire order.
answer.en: A: Yes, we can match your specified Pantone colors for both fabric dyeing and printing. Lab dips are provided for approval before bulk production to ensure color consistency across your entire order.

question.en: Q: What Customization Options Do You Offer?

We provide complete OEM and ODM services, including:

- Puff Printing

question.en: Q: Which U.S. Cities Do You Ship To Most Frequently?

answer.zh: We regularly ship to major U.S. fashion and distribution hubs, including Los Angeles, New York, Miami, Houston, Chicago, and Atlanta. Our logistics partners ensure reliable delivery across all 50 states.
answer.en: A: We regularly ship to major U.S. fashion and distribution hubs, including Los Angeles, New York, Miami, Houston, Chicago, and Atlanta. Our logistics partners ensure reliable delivery across all 50 states.

question.zh: How Quickly Can I Receive A Quotation?
question.en: Q: How Quickly Can I Receive A Quotation?

answer.zh: We typically provide detailed quotations within 12 hours of receiving your design files, tech pack, or product requirements. For urgent projects, same-day pricing is often available.
answer.en: A: We typically provide detailed quotations within 12 hours of receiving your design files, tech pack, or product requirements. For urgent projects, same-day pricing is often available.

question.zh: Do You Sign NDAs And Protect Designs?
question.en: Q: Do You Sign NDAs And Protect Designs?

answer.zh: Yes, we fully respect intellectual property. Non-disclosure agreements are available upon request, and all customer designs, patterns, and branding remain strictly confidential.
answer.en: A: Yes, we fully respect intellectual property. Non-disclosure agreements are available upon request, and all customer designs, patterns, and branding remain strictly confidential.
